name: Escape
_source: if;not any(unit.team == "player" for unit in game.units if unit.position)

name: Intro
_source: speak;Halvard;Rowan. The coal is lit. Keep it low, keep it hidden.
speak;Rowan;It's already glowing through my fingers. It knows something's coming.
speak;Iska;Imperial banners on the ridge. Cinder Wardens. A lot of them.
speak;Halvard;Take the coal and run if it turns bad. Promise me.
speak;Halvard;Good. Fear keeps flamekeepers alive. Mostly.

name: SickHouse
_source: speak;Woman2;My boy hasn't stopped coughing since the shrine flame flared last spring.
speak;Woman2;The healers call it mountain air. I've stopped believing that.

name: FightDraven
_source: speak;Draven;The coal, girl. Emberhollow is already ash. Do not add yourself to it.

name: WinGame
_source: speak;Rowan;Draven's men are broken. Where's Halvard?
speak;Iska;Rowan... I found his cloak by the shrine stone. Just the cloak.
speak;Rowan;Then we carry the coal. For him.

name: Intro
_source: speak;Rowan;Keep the line moving. Emberhold's a day off if we don't stop.
speak;Sable;Some of these folks haven't slept since Emberhollow burned.
speak;Rowan;Neither have I. Doesn't matter right now.
speak;Iska;Scouts on the ridge. Not soldiers. Cinder Wardens again.

name: ShrineRuin
_source: speak;Rowan;Every animal near this shrine stump is dead. Every one.
speak;Iska;Ground's not scorched. Nothing burned them.

name: TalkTamsin
_source: speak;Iska;You've got that look. The one where the orders stopped making sense.
speak;Tamsin;I was told to count the sick. Not to ask why there were so many.
speak;Tamsin;I saw what's near that ruin. I'm done counting for them.

name: House
_source: speak;Woman1;Water's dear out here. Take what's in the jug, and take the road markers seriously.
speak;Woman1;Emberhold's not far now. Further than it looks, though, with the sun the way it is.

name: Escape
_source: speak;Rowan;Emberhold's smoke on the horizon. We made it.
speak;Sable;Whatever's waiting there, at least it's not a road full of soldiers.

name: Intro
_source: speak;Rowan;Emberhold. Halvard talked about this place like it was a myth.
speak;Iska;Myth's got a working forge and a very loud arena. I'll take it.

name: Arena
_source: speak;Jack;The pit takes one challenger at a time. My champion, your best swing. Winner keeps the javelin.
speak;Jack;Clean work. The javelin's yours, and the purse with it. Now clear out before the crowd wants seconds.

name: Archive
_source: speak;Rowan;Ledgers. Flamekeeper ledgers, going back a century.
speak;Rowan;Deaths in every shrine village, season after season. Someone kept count and said nothing.
speak;Iska;Someone with very tidy handwriting. The man by the red-roofed house keeps looking over here.

name: TalkCorwin
_source: speak;Rowan;You kept the ledgers. You knew what the shrines were doing to us.
speak;Corwin;I counted. Counting felt like scholarship. Silence felt like safety. It was neither.
speak;Corwin;Take me with you. When you reach the reliquary, you will want someone who reads old valve schematics.
speak;Rowan;Then stop counting and start speaking, archivist.

name: TalkKid
_source: speak;Boy2;Watch this! Halvard's old drill, one hundred swings before breakfast!
speak;Boy2;You do it too! I bet you can't even keep up!

name: TalkVillager1
_source: speak;Man1;Stalls up the north road, forge across from them. The pit down southwest pays in bruises and javelins.
speak;Man1;And if you want strange reading, the archivist keeps his door shut by the red-roofed house southeast.

name: Depart
_source: speak;Corwin;The road to the reliquary isn't kind. Watch your footing.
speak;Rowan;We're not stopping again until this is over.
speak;Rowan;Rested, armed, and out of reasons to wait. South it is.

name: Intro
_source: speak;Rowan;The coal-bearers move slow. We clear the way to the reliquary gate, nothing else.
speak;Corwin;Whatever you do, don't let them take the reliquary. Please.
speak;Iska;The inner reliquary is down those stairs. The wardens left the gates open for their coal-carts.

name: Turn3
_source: speak;Ysolde;Hold! Get the wounded behind me before they bleed out further!

name: TalkYsolde
_source: speak;Rowan;Enough. Put the staff down before you fall too.
speak;Ysolde;I've healed forty soldiers this year of a sickness with no wound.
speak;Ysolde;It's the ember. It's always been the ember. Gods forgive me for knowing.

name: Seize
_source: speak;Rowan;The reliquary's ours. So is a very unwelcome truth.

name: Intro
_source: speak;Maren;Emberfall's shrine is the last one standing between here and the coast.
speak;Corwin;Rowan. Voss's whole column is coming. Not a patrol. All of it.
speak;Iska;Voss's whole column is coming, Rowan. Not a patrol. All of it.

name: Turn4Wave
_source: speak;Garrow;Torch the granary! Nobody said we had to be gentle about this!

name: Turn8Maren
_source: speak;Maren;Rowan. Come here, child. Sit with me a moment.
speak;Maren;I have watched this shrine take a life a season for forty years.
speak;Maren;We called it the flame's blessing. It was never a blessing.
speak;Rowan;Then why did you let us believe it? Why did Halvard?
speak;Maren;Because hope keeps hands moving. Even a false hope. I'm sorry.

name: Storehouse
_source: speak;Rowan;The storehouse still stands. And someone left mail cut for a flamekeeper's frame.

name: FightGarrow
_source: speak;Garrow;Coin's coin. Nothing personal in it, torch-girl.

name: WinGame
_source: speak;Maren;Rowan. I have watched this shrine take a life a season for forty years.
speak;Maren;We called it the flame's blessing. It was never a blessing. I'm sorry.
speak;Rowan;We held the village. Maren didn't hold on much longer after.
speak;Iska;So what now? Everything we've bled for is the thing that's killing them.
speak;Rowan;Now we go end it. All of it. At the source.

name: Intro
_source: speak;Voss;You carried that coal a long way to die next to it.
speak;Rowan;You're not wrong about the ember, Voss. You're wrong about how to end it.
speak;Voss;Slow and careful got Emberhollow burned. I don't do slow anymore.
speak;Voss;Three valves. One good swing. That's my plan. Don't get near it.
speak;Corwin;The fourth valve fused shut decades ago. Three will have to do.
speak;Rowan;Halvard's ledgers said the fourth valve fused shut decades ago. Three will have to do.

name: Valve1
_source: speak;Iska;Valve's open. Pressure's already dropping on this side.
speak;Rowan;All three are open. To the core, before Voss cracks it.

name: Valve2
_source: speak;Sable;This valve's loose. The heat off the core is fading already.
speak;Rowan;All three are open. To the core, before Voss cracks it.

name: Valve3
_source: speak;Rowan;That's another valve done. The vault's breath is slowing.
speak;Rowan;All three are open. To the core, before Voss cracks it.

name: Turn5Wave
_source: speak;Voss;Reinforcements, hold the gate! I want that vault cracked, not quenched!

name: FightVoss
_source: speak;Voss;One good swing ends a century of lies. Stand aside or share the vault's grave.

name: QuenchWin
_source: speak;Rowan;It's done. No bloom. No blessing left to lie about, either.
speak;Ysolde;Voss believed he was the only one willing to pay the price. He wasn't.
speak;Rowan;Nobody else has to pay it now. That's the part he never let himself hope for.
speak;Rowan;Voss believed he was the only one willing to pay the price. He wasn't. And nobody else has to now.

name: QuenchFail
_source: speak;Rowan;The core still rages. The valves first.

name: Intro
_source: speak;Rowan;This is it, then. The muster's called every volunteer the capital could spare. Time to see who answered.
level_var;capital_pool;[n for n in game.level_vars['capital_pool'] if n != game.game_vars['GreetPick']]
speak;Kael;I've walked farther than I can count. One more road won't hurt.
choice;RecruitKael;Bring Kael along?;Yes|Welcome aboard.,Wait|One more question first.
speak;Kael;Where I go isn't as important as making myself useful. Point me at the road.
speak;Elara;I've read every account of the Emberwardens I could find. Now I'd like to see it firsthand.
choice;RecruitElara;Bring Elara along?;Yes|Welcome aboard.,Wait|One more question first.
speak;Elara;Theory only carries a scholar so far. I'd rather test it than shelve it.
speak;Ren;You need someone who can finish a fight quickly. That's me.
choice;RecruitRen;Bring Ren along?;Yes|Welcome aboard.,Wait|One more question first.
speak;Ren;I don't lose duels. I don't plan to start losing wars, either.
speak;Briar;The frontier's already teaching me its lessons. Might as well put them to use.
choice;RecruitBriar;Bring Briar along?;Yes|Welcome aboard.,Wait|One more question first.
speak;Briar;Ask the wind where it's going next. I go where the fighting's fiercest.

choice;GreetPick;Last but not least, who else has come?;game.level_vars['capital_pool'];expression

speak;Kael;I've walked farther than I can count. One more road won't hurt.
choice;RecruitKael;Bring Kael along?;Yes|Welcome aboard.,Wait|One more question first.

choice;RecruitBriar;Bring Briar along?;Yes|Welcome aboard.,Wait|One more question first.
speak;Briar;Ask the wind where it's going next. I go where the fighting's fiercest.
speak;Rowan;Four volunteers. That'll have to be enough. Let's get you outfitted before we march.
speak;Rowan;Kael, you're up first. Choose your path.
choice;FeatPick_Kael;Choose a feat for Kael;fMaximum HP +5|Vitality,fSkill +3|Keen Eye,fSpeed +2|Swift Step,fDefense +2|Sturdy Guard,fLuck +4|Fortune's Favor;EntryType=type_skill
speak;Rowan;Elara, your turn. Choose your path.
choice;FeatPick_Elara;Choose a feat for Elara;fMaximum HP +5|Vitality,fSkill +3|Keen Eye,fSpeed +2|Swift Step,fDefense +2|Sturdy Guard,fLuck +4|Fortune's Favor;EntryType=type_skill
speak;Rowan;Ren, your turn. Choose your path.
choice;FeatPick_Ren;Choose a feat for Ren;fMaximum HP +5|Vitality,fSkill +3|Keen Eye,fSpeed +2|Swift Step,fDefense +2|Sturdy Guard,fLuck +4|Fortune's Favor;EntryType=type_skill
speak;Rowan;Briar, last one. Choose your path.
choice;FeatPick_Briar;Choose a feat for Briar;fMaximum HP +5|Vitality,fSkill +3|Keen Eye,fSpeed +2|Swift Step,fDefense +2|Sturdy Guard,fLuck +4|Fortune's Favor;EntryType=type_skill
speak;Rowan;Good -- everyone's found their footing. The armory can still fit you out with extra gear, and the road south leads out when you're ready.

name: TalkHalvard
_source: speak;Halvard;Rowan. Good coal, steady hands, and companions who won't bolt at the first blade drawn -- that's what gets a flamekeeper home again. Go on, get everyone sorted before the gate.

name: TalkMaren
_source: speak;Maren;Forty years I've watched keepers walk out that gate. Watched some walk back, too. Mind you're one of the ones who does.

name: Depart
_source: speak;Rowan;Rested, armed, and out of reasons to wait. Emberhollow's this way. Let's move.
